source: Example only. Copy to release/cloudflare-observation.local.json after read-only Cloudflare checks. Never paste credentials, API payloads, Worker source, binding values, certificate material, or logs.
note: Only expected Salary Hijacking Worker names, Worker secret names, and booleans belong here. Do not include retro-db, unrelated projects, raw responses, tokens, secret values, private keys, or certificates.
